attributes.action: Immediate General Election after local elections show no confidence in Labour
attributes.additional_details: Call an immediate general election to let the people decide.
attributes.background: Call an immediate General election after clearly no confidence in the government.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
